Metadata.title: HTG — Hacking The Game
Metadata.description: HTG — Hacking The Game. Recordings, workshops and individual sessions online.

Landing.title: We're working on a new version
Landing.description: We're preparing a new, improved platform for you. The current service is still available via the button below.

Home.hero_subtitle: Sessions led by Natalia HTG — available online, at your own pace.
Home.vod_subtitle: Discover recordings from recent workshops and group sessions.
Home.subscriptions_subtitle: Flexible options for accessing our session archive.
Home.help_subtitle: We're here to help. Call or write to us.

Auth.code_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to {email}.
Auth.link_sent_subtitle: Check your email and click the link.
Auth.link_sent_check: We sent a login link to {email}. Click it to log in.
Auth.error_email: Failed to send. Please try again.
Auth.error_rate_limit: Too many login attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
Auth.error_passkey: Biometric login failed. Try another method.
Auth.consent_label: I consent to the processing of my data regarding beliefs and health status for the purpose of providing spiritual development sessions (GDPR Art. 9).

Sessions.title: Group sessions
Sessions.subtitle: Recordings from workshops and group sessions available in monthly packages or individually.
Sessions.sessions_in_set: {count, plural, one {# session} other {# sessions}} in set
Sessions.empty_description: We're working on making our archive available. Check back soon!

Subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
Subscriptions.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your needs.
Subscriptions.a_la_carte_desc: Choose specific sessions from any month. Access for 24 months from purchase — you buy it, you own it.
Subscriptions.monthly_desc: Ready-made set of sessions from a given month at a lower price. Access for 24 months from purchase — you buy it, you own it.
Subscriptions.yearly_desc: Full access to the entire archive and new sessions for 12 months. Pay for 10 months, get 12.
Subscriptions.yearly_notice: The Yearly Package is a rental of the full session catalog for 12 months. After the year ends, access expires unless you renew.
Subscriptions.ownership_notice: You buy it, you keep it for 24 months
Subscriptions.rental_notice: You rent the catalog for 12 months

PrivateRecordings.sharing_prohibited: Sharing this recording with third parties is prohibited.

Recordings.title: Public recordings
Recordings.subtitle: Free materials on YouTube — get to know our work.

Account.title: My Account
Account.no_sessions: You don't have access to any sessions yet.
Account.passkey_none: You don't have any passkeys yet. Add one to log in with fingerprint or face recognition.
Account.passkey_confirm_remove: Are you sure you want to remove this passkey?
Account.passkey_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Account.no_subscriptions: You don't have any active subscriptions.
Account.full_catalog_access: Full access to the entire session archive

Player.concurrent_message: Your account is already playing content on another device. Stop playback there to start here.
Player.load_error: Failed to load the recording. Please try again.

Individual.title: Individual Sessions
Individual.subtitle: Private live session with Natalia HTG. Choose a session type, preferred date and pay online.
Individual.step_1: Choose session type — solo with Natalia or with an assistant (Agata / Justyna).
Individual.step_2: Select your preferred date — we'll contact you to confirm the exact time.
Individual.step_3: Pay online — you'll receive an invoice and confirmation via email.
Individual.step_4: On the session day, you'll receive a room link — join at the scheduled time.
Individual.date_hint: We'll contact you to confirm the exact date and time.
Individual.topics_placeholder: Describe what you'd like to work on during the session...
Individual.cancel_policy: Guaranteed rescheduling is available up to 48 hours before the session. Rescheduling less than 48h before the session depends on another person taking the slot. Session cancellation: within 14 days of purchase.

Admin.title: Admin Panel
Admin.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete?
Admin.confirm_cancel: Are you sure you want to cancel?
Admin.users_desc: User management — list, search, filter by role and status.
Admin.subscriptions_desc: Overview of all entitlements and subscriptions, grouped by user.
Admin.sessions_desc: Session template management — add, edit, archive.
Admin.sets_desc: Monthly sets management — create, edit, assign sessions.

Staff.title: Panel
Staff.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete?
Staff.sessions_desc: Upcoming sessions where you are the practitioner or assistant.
Staff.clients_desc: Users who have booked sessions with you.

Booking.title: Individual Sessions
Booking.subtitle: Your booked sessions and available time slots.
Booking.no_bookings: You don't have any bookings yet.
Booking.unbooked_desc: You have {count, plural, one {# session} other {# sessions}} to book.
Booking.confirm_message: You have 24 hours to confirm your booking. After that, the slot will be released.
Booking.cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this session?
Booking.topics_placeholder: Describe what you'd like to work on...
Booking.acceleration_offered: An earlier slot has been offered:
Booking.select_day: Select a day from the calendar
Booking.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Booking.success_transferred: Session moved to the new slot.
Booking.reschedule_confirm_message: Your session will be moved to the selected slot. The previous slot will be released.

8plus.0: A longer road lies ahead — and that's a beautiful thing. Each day brings you closer.
8plus.1: Time is your ally. Let it work in your favour.
8plus.2: Great things need time to ripen. Your session is no exception.
8plus.3: A seed planted in silence is already growing. You're preparing too, even if you can't see it yet.
8plus.4: It's a long walk, but every step matters. Your session waits at the end of this path.

7.0: Seven months is a lot of time — and less than you think.
7.1: Between today and your session, there's a whole world of possibility.
7.2: The seasons will change before we meet. And so might you.
7.3: Still far away, but the direction is clear. Your session is on the calendar.
7.4: Some things are worth waiting for. Your session is one of them.

6.0: Half a year until your session. Time you can use wisely.
6.1: Six months — long enough to prepare, short enough to feel the excitement.
6.2: You're at the halfway point since you booked. Balance.
6.3: Six months pass faster than you expect. Especially when you know what you're waiting for.
6.4: Half a year. Imagine who you'll be when the day arrives.

5.0: Five months. The countdown is picking up speed.
5.1: Getting closer. Five months is a distance you can already see on the horizon.
5.2: Your session is approaching step by step. Five months is no longer abstract.
5.3: In five months you'll be in a completely different place. The session is just one part of that journey.
5.4: Five months — time in which you can learn a lot about yourself. And about what you're looking for.

4.0: Four months. Your session is slowly emerging from the mist of the future.
4.1: One more season will pass before we meet.
4.2: Four months — close enough to start thinking about what you want to say.
4.3: Time flies. Four months separate you from something important.
4.4: The session is becoming more real. Four months is already concrete.

3.0: Three months — close enough to feel the excitement.
3.1: Just a little more patience. Three months will pass faster than you think.
3.2: One quarter. The final stretch before your session begins now.
3.3: Three months is the perfect time to gather your thoughts and prepare for the meeting.
3.4: Counting down in quarters — and you only have one left.

2.0: Two months. Your session is almost within reach.
2.1: Eight weeks stand between you and your session. That's less than you think.
2.2: You're approaching fast. Two months is the home stretch.
2.3: In two months everything will become clearer. For now — enjoy the anticipation.
2.4: The final phase of the countdown. Two months and you'll be there.

1.0: Just one month left. You can almost hear the session knocking at the door.
1.1: One month. Time for last preparations — or simply to be present.
1.2: The finish line. In a month we'll meet for your session.
1.3: Four weeks. That's a blink of an eye compared to how long you've already waited.
1.4: The last month. Everything you need is already within you.

lt1.0: Almost there. The final days before your session.
lt1.1: Can you feel it? Your session is just around the corner.
lt1.2: Counting in days now. It's truly close.
lt1.3: Just a moment more and we'll meet. Get ready for something special.
lt1.4: The home stretch. Days separate you from your session — not months, not weeks. Days.

Live.waiting_message: The session will start when the facilitator admits you. Please wait.
Live.staff_waiting: Client is waiting in the lobby. Click below to admit.
Live.outro_message: The session has been ended by the facilitator. You can stay a bit longer or close the room.
Live.error_message: Failed to connect to the session room.

Publikacja.title: Publication panel
Publikacja.add_session_desc: Manually add a session — upload raw WAV files that did not come from LiveKit.

Daw.no_tracks: No source tracks available for editing.

AutoEdit.no_source_tracks: No source tracks available for processing.
AutoEdit.pipeline_done: Auto-edit completed successfully! Listen to the result and approve or reject.
AutoEdit.no_transcription: No transcription available. Run the transcription stage first.

Community.meta_description: Join the HTG community. Discuss, share experiences, and grow with others.
